scripts.build:css: for f in css/*.css; do case "$f" in *.min.css) continue;; esac; npx csso "$f" -o "${f%.css}.min.css"; done
scripts.build:js: for f in js/*.js; do case "$f" in *.min.js) continue;; esac; npx terser "$f" -o "${f%.js}.min.js" -c -m; done
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
